2473413874.title: Thirsty Hippo Dehumidifier Moisture Absorber 600ml x 8
2473413874.detail_text: Thirsty Hippo is a dehumidifier which freshens the damp closet with immediate absorption of moist in the air, providing freshness by removing moisture. It helps to keep small spaces dry and fresh by preventing the proliferation of mildew which is the main cause of odors. Key benefits: 1. Prevent mold and mildew 2. Combat odors 3. Lasts up to 2 months - Thirsty Hippo starts absorbing moisture in 5 minutes. The absorption will last 2-3 months 4. Protects personal belongings -Thirsty Hippo is small and compact which can be placed in small spaces such as closets and shoe racks, keeping them dry and fresh. How to use: 1. Open the pink lid. 2. Remove the aluminum foil cover, do not tear white paper. 3. Replace the pink lid and place your Thirsty Hippo! Ingredient: 100% calcium chloride
2473413874.detail_html:
Thirsty Hippo is a dehumidifier which freshens the damp closet with immediate absorption of moist in the air, providing freshness by removing moisture. It helps to keep small spaces dry and fresh by preventing the proliferation of mildew which is the main cause of odors.

1. Prevent mold and mildew

2. Combat odors

3. Lasts up to 2 months - Thirsty Hippo starts absorbing moisture in 5 minutes. The absorption will last 2-3 months

4. Protects personal belongings -Thirsty Hippo is small and compact which can be placed in small spaces such as closets and shoe racks, keeping them dry and fresh.

How to use:

1. Open the pink lid.

2. Remove the aluminum foil cover, do not tear white paper.

3. Replace the pink lid and place your Thirsty Hippo!

Ingredient: 100% calcium chloride

product.desc:
Thirsty Hippo is a dehumidifier which freshens the damp closet with immediate absorption of moist in the air, providing freshness by removing moisture. It helps to keep small spaces dry and fresh by preventing the proliferation of mildew which is the main cause of odors.

Key benefits:

1. Prevent mold and mildew

2. Combat odors

3. Lasts up to 2 months - Thirsty Hippo starts absorbing moisture in 5 minutes. The absorption will last 2-3 months

4. Protects personal belongings -Thirsty Hippo is small and compact which can be placed in small spaces such as closets and shoe racks, keeping them dry and fresh.

How to use:

1. Open the pink lid.

2. Remove the aluminum foil cover, do not tear white paper.

3. Replace the pink lid and place your Thirsty Hippo!

Ingredient: 100% calcium chloride

3202570857.title: Cornell 12L 30L Dehumidifier, High Coverage Area with Real Time Display
3202570857.detail_text: * For Timer function, can tap timer button and then followed up by humidity button. Transform your living space with the Cornell Dehumidifier, designed to create a comfortable and healthy environment in your home. This powerful and efficient dehumidifier is ideal for areas up to 25m² (~270 sqft), making it perfect for bedrooms, living rooms, or basements. Key Features: High Performance: Operating at 200W with two speed settings (Low/High), the Cornell Dehumidifier efficiently removes up to 12 liters of moisture daily, ensuring your space remains dry and comfortable. User-Friendly Design: The 2.0L detachable water tank allows for easy maintenance, while the auto-stop feature prevents overflow by shutting off the unit when the tank is full. For added convenience, a water pipe is included for continuous auto-draining, eliminating the need for frequent tank emptying. Quiet Operation: Enjoy a peaceful atmosphere with low noise levels ≤ 36dB, making it ideal for use in bedrooms or during sleep mode. Real-Time Humidity Display: Monitor your indoor humidity levels with the clear display. Set your desired humidity between 30-80% for optimal comfort. Versatile Modes: Choose between Auto, Sleep, and Continuous modes to customise your dehumidification experience based on your needs. Plus, the 24-hour timer setting lets you schedule operation times effortlessly. For timer function, can tap timer button and then followed up by humidity button. Smart Indicators: Stay informed with the 3 light indicators for humidity levels: Blue (below 46%), Green (below 64%), and Red (above 65%), ensuring you always know when to adjust settings. Built-in Protection: Featuring a child lock safety feature, built-in air inlet filter, and side air outlet, this dehumidifier prevents dust accumulation while keeping your home safe and clean. Eco-Friendly Refrigerant: Utilizing R290 refrigerant, this dehumidifier is an environmentally friendly choice for maintaining air quality. Specifications 12L 220-240V / 50Hz / 200W / 2 Speed (Low/High) / R290 refrigerant Coverage Area : 25m² / ~270sqft Detachable 2.0L Water Tank Low Noise ≤ 36dB Dehumidification Capacity: 12L/Daily Real-Time Humidity Display, Humidity Setting: 30-80% 3 Modes: Auto / Sleep / Continuous Up to 24 Hours Timer Setting Built-in Air Inlet Filter and Side Air Outlet to Prevent Dust Accumulation Auto Stop when Water Tank is Full Safety Mark no. – 220317-24 Product dim/wt – (L260 x W210 x H460)mm/10kg Giftbox dim/wt – (L305 x W275 x H500)mm/11kg Specifications 30L 220-240V / 50Hz / 475W / 2 Speed (Low/High) / R290 refrigerant Coverage Area : 40m² / ~430sqft Detachable 4.0L Water Tank Low Noise ≤ 43dB Dehumidification Capacity: 30L/Daily Real-Time Humidity Display, Humidity Setting : 30-80% 3 Modes : Auto / Sleep / Continuous Up to 24 Hours Timer Setting Built-in Air Inlet Filter and Side Air Outlet to Prevent Dust Accumulation Auto Stop when Water Tank is Full Safety Mark no. – 220317-24 Product dim/wt – (L340 x W265 x H520)mm/14.5kg Giftbox dim/wt – (L388 x W313 x H610)mm/15.5kg *Important The Dehumidifier starts working when the room humidity is 3% higher than the selected humidity. For example: When you select a targeted humidity level at 50%, room humidity level is 49%, the compressor and fan will stop working after a 30-second delay. The compressor and fan will start working when the room humidity is is above 53%. Timer function, can tap timer button and then followed up by humidity button.
3202570857.detail_html:
*For Timer function, can tap timer button and then followed up by humidity button.

Transform your living space with the Cornell Dehumidifier, designed to create a comfortable and healthy environment in your home. This powerful and efficient dehumidifier is ideal for areas up to 25m² (~270 sqft), making it perfect for bedrooms, living rooms, or basements.

Key Features:

High Performance: Operating at 200W with two speed settings (Low/High), the Cornell Dehumidifier efficiently removes up to 12 liters of moisture daily, ensuring your space remains dry and comfortable.

User-Friendly Design: The 2.0L detachable water tank allows for easy maintenance, while the auto-stop feature prevents overflow by shutting off the unit when the tank is full. For added convenience, a water pipe is included for continuous auto-draining, eliminating the need for frequent tank emptying.

Quiet Operation: Enjoy a peaceful atmosphere with low noise levels ≤ 36dB, making it ideal for use in bedrooms or during sleep mode.

Real-Time Humidity Display: Monitor your indoor humidity levels with the clear display. Set your desired humidity between 30-80% for optimal comfort.

Versatile Modes: Choose between Auto, Sleep, and Continuous modes to customise your dehumidification experience based on your needs. Plus, the 24-hour timer setting lets you schedule operation times effortlessly. For timer function, can tap timer button and then followed up by humidity button.

Smart Indicators: Stay informed with the 3 light indicators for humidity levels: Blue (below 46%), Green (below 64%), and Red (above 65%), ensuring you always know when to adjust settings.

Built-in Protection: Featuring a child lock safety feature, built-in air inlet filter, and side air outlet, this dehumidifier prevents dust accumulation while keeping your home safe and clean.

Eco-Friendly Refrigerant: Utilizing R290 refrigerant, this dehumidifier is an environmentally friendly choice for maintaining air quality.

Specifications 12L

220-240V / 50Hz / 200W / 2 Speed (Low/High) / R290 refrigerant

Coverage Area : 25m² / ~270sqft

Detachable 2.0L Water Tank

Low Noise ≤ 36dB

Dehumidification Capacity: 12L/Daily

Real-Time Humidity Display, Humidity Setting: 30-80%

3 Modes: Auto / Sleep / Continuous

Up to 24 Hours Timer Setting

Built-in Air Inlet Filter and Side Air Outlet to Prevent Dust Accumulation

Auto Stop when Water Tank is Full

Safety Mark no. – 220317-24

Product dim/wt – (L260 x W210 x H460)mm/10kg

Giftbox dim/wt – (L305 x W275 x H500)mm/11kg

Specifications 30L

220-240V / 50Hz / 475W / 2 Speed (Low/High) / R290 refrigerant

Coverage Area : 40m² / ~430sqft

Detachable 4.0L Water Tank

Low Noise ≤ 43dB

Dehumidification Capacity: 30L/Daily

Real-Time Humidity Display, Humidity Setting : 30-80%

3 Modes : Auto / Sleep / Continuous

Up to 24 Hours Timer Setting

Built-in Air Inlet Filter and Side Air Outlet to Prevent Dust Accumulation

Auto Stop when Water Tank is Full

Safety Mark no. – 220317-24

Product dim/wt – (L340 x W265 x H520)mm/14.5kg

Giftbox dim/wt – (L388 x W313 x H610)mm/15.5kg

*Important

The Dehumidifier starts working when the room humidity is 3% higher than the selected humidity.

For example: When you select a targeted humidity level at 50%, room humidity level is 49%, the compressor and fan will stop working after a 30-second delay. The compressor and fan will start working when the room humidity is is above 53%.

Timer function, can tap timer button and then followed up by humidity button.

Giftbox dim/wt – (L388 x W313 x H610)mm/15.5kg

*Important

The Dehumidifier starts working when the room humidity is 3% higher than the selected humidity.

For example: When you select a targeted humidity level at 50%, room humidity level is 49%, the compressor and fan will stop working after a 30-second delay. The compressor and fan will start working when the room humidity is is above 53%.

Timer function, can tap timer button and then followed up by humidity button.
product.highlights:
• 220-240V / 50Hz / 200W / 2 Speed (Low/High) / R290 refrigerant
  • Coverage Area : 25m² / ~270sqft
  • Detachable 2.0L Water Tank

  • Dehumidification Capacity: 12L/Daily
  • Real-Time Humidity Display, Humidity Setting : 30-80%
  • 3 Modes : Auto / Sleep / Continuous
  • Timer function, can tap timer button and then followed up by humidity button
  • Up to 24 Hours Timer Setting
  • Built-in Air Inlet Filter and Side Air Outlet to Prevent Dust Accumulation
  • Auto Stop when Water Tank is Full
  • Barcode - 955 5089 627613
  • Safety Mark no. – 220317-24 (Only Applies to Power Cable)
  • Product dim/wt – (L260 x W210 x H460)mm/10kg

2388504396.title: SHARP 4L Dehumidifier (DW-D12A-W) 26m²
2388504396.detail_text: Specifications BrandSharpSKU2388504396_SGAMZ-14007603185WirelessNoRoom Size26 m²Power Consumption160 WModeldw-d12a-w Qualification License Type SG_CPSO License Code Highlights Sharp Dehumidifier The dehumidifier deodorizes, cleans and quickly dries clothes hung up in the room by using the high-concentration Plasmacluster Ion (PCI) technology and the powerful dehumidifying function. CLOTHES DRYING MODE : Quickly dry laundry with maximum air flow, and stop automatically. The dehumidifying and air supply functions work together to effectively dry clothes hung up in the room. The dehumidifier will stop automatically after the clothes are dried. AUTO SWING : The dehumidifier swings its louvers over a wide angle to dry and dehumidify a large area. PLEASANT DEHUMIDIFYING : Maintain desired humidity for a pleasant room atmosphere. LARGE WATER TANK: The dehumidifier comes with a 4.0L water tank which can fully meet the dehumidifying requirement. Continuous drainage is enabled CONTINUOUS DRAINAGE : Outlet to allow small hose to be attached to the dehumidifier for water drainage Plasmacluster Ion Density: 7,000 ions/cm3 Area coverage : 13-25m2 Plasmacluster enables to suppress airborne mold. Suppress mold growth even if attached - reduce humidity level till less than 70% Laundry mode mounted - Flexible louver gives efficient laundry drying Description If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here VIEW MORE

brand.name: Sharp
brand.suggestion: More Heating, Cooling and Ventilation from Sharp

product.highlights:
Sharp Dehumidifier

The dehumidifier deodorizes, cleans and quickly dries clothes hung up in the room by using the high-concentration Plasmacluster Ion (PCI) technology and the powerful dehumidifying function.

CLOTHES DRYING MODE : Quickly dry laundry with maximum air flow, and stop automatically. The dehumidifying and air supply functions work together to effectively dry clothes hung up in the room. The dehumidifier will stop automatically after the clothes are dried.

AUTO SWING : The dehumidifier swings its louvers over a wide angle to dry and dehumidify a large area.

PLEASANT DEHUMIDIFYING : Maintain desired humidity for a pleasant room atmosphere.

LARGE WATER TANK: The dehumidifier comes with a 4.0L water tank which can fully meet the dehumidifying requirement. Continuous drainage is enabled

CONTINUOUS DRAINAGE : Outlet to allow small hose to be attached to the dehumidifier for water drainage

Plasmacluster Ion Density: 7,000 ions/cm3

Area coverage : 13-25m2

Plasmacluster enables to suppress airborne mold.

Suppress mold growth even if attached

- reduce humidity level till less than 70%

Laundry mode mounted

- Flexible louver gives efficient laundry drying

aiTexts: This bundle includes eight 500ml charcoal moisture absorber dehumidifiers that effectively remove excess humidity and prevent mold.
Each unit features dual absorption with activated charcoal and calcium chloride granules for enhanced moisture control and odor elimination.
Equipped with a white filter to prevent water leakage and a middle partition that boosts absorption efficiency.
The eco-friendly design offers DIY customization by adding dried flowers or charcoal for personalized fragrance and improved air quality.
Ideal for various spaces such as rooms, closets, kitchens, cars, and boats, keeping them fresh and dry, especially in humid seasons.
Compact dimensions (15x8x10.5 cm) provide a practical dehumidifying solution with a 3-year shelf life.

description.text: Remove seal and place in places such as cupboards & drawers to remove moisture.

RedMart Charcoal Dehumidifier (8 packs) helps reduce excess moisture and prevent mold and odors in your home. Made with natural charcoal, it effectively absorbs humidity, keeping spaces fresh and dry. Perfect for closets, bathrooms, and storage areas, each pack provides long-lasting freshness and protection.

301164266.detail_text: How to use Examine the dehumidifier thoroughly to ensure that no cracks or holes are present before use. Do not use if it is damaged. Remove the lid, tear of the aluminium sheet and tightly close the lid again. Do not remove the white filter sheet. Place the dehumidifier where it's required. Please ensure that the base is flat to prevent spillage. About Product Highly effective solution for reducing moisture and preventing mold in enclosed spaces. Each unit absorbs excess humidity, protecting clothes, furniture, and electronics from dampness. With a convenient 3-pack, these dehumidifiers offer long-lasting freshness and comfort in areas like closets, bathrooms, and basements.

3212478233.title: (Mix& Match) Purfresh 600ml Large Dehumidifier Box Moisture Absorber | Dehumidifier Agent, Anti-mildew, Deodorising
3212478233.detail_text: SG Brand SG READY STOCK - FAST SHIPPING All our fragrance-free products have now been fully upgraded to activated charcoal — offering improved odor absorption and air freshness while remaining scent-free. Suitable for Use: Bathrooms, bedrooms, kitchens, closets, and laundry rooms. Duration: Lasts up to 45 days. Features: The product utilizes 100% Calcium Chloride, offering excellent moisture absorption capability. Helps prevent the growth of mold and mildew, addressing issues related to dampness. 2912632114.title: Cornell Tabletop Dehumidifier 600ml Water Tank with Auto Shut Off Function
2912632114.detail_text: Introducing our efficient and compact dehumidifier, designed to create a more comfortable and healthier environment in spaces up to 25m². With a remarkable daily dehumidification capacity of 300ml, this appliance is your ideal companion in the battle against excess moisture. Say goodbye to musty odors, mold, and the discomfort caused by high humidity levels. Our dehumidifier is the perfect solution for bedrooms, living rooms, and small office spaces, ensuring a fresh, dry atmosphere that you can breathe easy in. It's sleek, easy to use, and quietly goes about its work, making it a valuable addition to any room in your home or workspace. The Cornell dehumidifier for home have a capacity of 600ml, it can remove up to 300 ml of water per day in a humid environment of 30°C and 80% RH. Features Detachable 600ml Water Tank Coverage Area : 10-25m² Low Noise ≤ 35db Dehumidification Capacity: 300ml/Daily Applicable Ambient Temperature: 5°C - 50°C Energy Efficient Semiconductor Technology: Non-chemical materials & freon gas One Touch Operation: Effortlessly control your devices with a single touch for ultimate convenience. Ambient Light Indicator: Green=On, Orange=Stop (Water tank is full) Product Dimension: 14cm (L) x 14cm (W) x 22cm (H)

product.desc:
Introducing our efficient and compact dehumidifier, designed to create a more comfortable and healthier environment in spaces up to 25m². With a remarkable daily dehumidification capacity of 300ml, this appliance is your ideal companion in the battle against excess moisture. Say goodbye to musty odors, mold, and the discomfort caused by high humidity levels.

Our dehumidifier is the perfect solution for bedrooms, living rooms, and small office spaces, ensuring a fresh, dry atmosphere that you can breathe easy in. It's sleek, easy to use, and quietly goes about its work, making it a valuable addition to any room in your home or workspace.

The Cornell dehumidifier for home have a capacity of 600ml, it can remove up to 300 ml of water per day in a humid environment of 30°C and 80% RH.

Features

Detachable 600ml Water Tank

Coverage Area : 10-25m²

Low Noise ≤ 35db

Dehumidification Capacity: 300ml/Daily

Applicable Ambient Temperature: 5°C - 50°C

Energy Efficient Semiconductor Technology: Non-chemical materials & freon gas

One Touch Operation: Effortlessly control your devices with a single touch for ultimate convenience.

Ambient Light Indicator: Green=On, Orange=Stop (Water tank is full)

Product Dimension: 14cm (L) x 14cm (W) x 22cm (H)

product.desc: AirPro DP28
product.highlights:
• Main differences between DH12 and DH24 are as followings:
  • 1. DH24 is 24L per day , DH12 is 12L per day;
  • 2. DH24 comes with HEPA filter, can be used as a 2-in-1 of dehumidifier and air purifier;
  • 3. DH24 comes with a Japanese brand compressor, DH12 comes with Chinese brand compressor;
  • 4. DH24 comes with WiFi;
  • 5. DH24 is 5L water tank, DH12 is 2.1L.

  • Since DH12 nylon filter is washable, default set or 1 extra filter is enough. DH24 comes with HEPA compound filter, like the one used in professional air purifier, so it is very effective. DH24 filter is not washable, you can vacuum the filter to clean. We recommend to buy at least 1 extra filter for DH24 if you also want to purify the air.

24-month Singapore Local Warranty

①Singapore Local Warranty: 1-to-1 exchange for any quality issues. We have 100% confidence in our product;

②In most cases, you only need to send us the video about the problem instead of visiting our warehouse.

Features

  • 3-PIN SG Plug, English panel, English manual, Higher Standard for Singapore market
  • Both models come with wheels and external water pipe
  • DH12 comes with 2.1L water tank, DH24 comes with 5L large water tank
  • DH12 comes with good quality compressor, DH24 comes with a Japanese brand compressor (the best brand compressor in dehumidifiers)
  • DH12 is 12L/Day, DH24 is 24L/Day dehumidification capability.
  • DH24 comes with compound filter, WIFI control

Notes with Connecting WiFi for DH24

Dear customer, there is description on the manual for how to connect WiFi , but there are some tip as following:

  • Connect your phone to the 2.4G WiFi instead of 5G, normally your home WiFi has both 2.4G and 5G
  • Use the AP mode instead of the default mode, in this mode, you can find on your phone a WiFi starts with SMART-, may need to wait and fresh.
  • Connect to the WiFi SMART-... then the dehumidifier will build connection with the home WiFi, connection will be done.

3075643410.detail_text: Green Dehumidifier Hanging Bag | Moisture Absorption Deodorizer Moisture Absorbers Hanging Bags: Hanging moisture absorber bags / packets, also act as odor and moisture eliminator and closet deoderizer. Works great for bathrooms, laundry rooms, storage closets, basements, garages, boats RV's and more Odor Eliminating Moisture Absorber packs: Our hanging moisture absorber packets provide an easy solution to protecting items and fabrics from excess moisture Valuables Dehumidifier: Hanging humidity bags are designed to be hung in enclosed spaces, effectively eliminating unpleasant musty odors caused by moisture. These condenser bags are moisture-proof, fragrance-free and perfect for valuables storage. Calcium Chloride Moisture Absorber: Our hanging moisture absorber packets won’t dry the air excessively to damage plants, furniture or other household goods. The humidity condensation bags contain calcium chloride pellets that work progressively to absorb moisture and rid damp in closed spaces. Closet dry packs 100 Grams each: Moisture absorbers last up to 15 days depending on temperature and conditions. Product may clump when exposed to moisture. This is nature of the product and not a defect. Product Form: Pellet

3547087553.title: 1000ml Smart Dehumidifier with Colorful LED Night Light Auto Shut Off Ultra Quiet Moisture Absorber for Bedroom Bathroom Closet
3547087553.detail_text: 【Smart Auto-Shutoff Dehumidifier with Full Tank Protection】 This compact household dehumidifier automatically stops operation when the 1L water tank reaches capacity, preventing overflows while the clear red indicator light alerts you to empty the container. Designed for worry-free operation, it maintains optimal humidity levels below 45% while consuming minimal energy. 【Energy-Efficient Moisture Control】 Operating at just 42W per hour, this eco-friendly dehumidifier effectively removes excess moisture from your living spaces while keeping electricity costs low. The advanced semiconductor technology continuously circulates air, trapping humidity and releasing refreshed, drier air to protect your belongings from dampness. 【Ultra-Quiet Performance with Sleep Mode】 With noise levels maintained below 46.2 dB, this unit operates quieter than a standard desk fan. The dedicated sleep mode ensures completely silent operation throughout the night, making it ideal for bedrooms and other quiet spaces where peace is prioritized. 【Multi-Room Application】 Perfect for creating healthier environments in moisture-sensitive areas including kitchens, closets, bathrooms, bedrooms, and offices. The compact design effectively controls humidity in spaces up to 215 square feet, preventing mold growth and protecting your valuables from moisture damage. Technical Specifications: Product Type: Household Dehumidifier Rated Voltage: 110-220V (Universal Compatibility) Water Tank Capacity: 1 Liter Rated Power: 42W Noise Level: Product Dimensions: 180×125×235mm Coverage Area: Up to 215 sq ft (20 m²) Package Includes: 1 × Household Dehumidifier Unit 1 × User Manual Ideal For: Small apartments and dorm rooms Closets and storage areas Bathrooms and kitchen spaces Offices and study rooms Basements and laundry areas Key Features: Automatic shutoff with visual indicator Energy-efficient 42W operation Ultra-quiet performance below 46.2 dB Special sleep mode for nighttime use Compact and portable design Maintains humidity below 45% Usage Tips: Place on a flat, stable surface for optimal performance Empty water tank promptly when indicator light activates Keep unit away from walls and furniture for proper airflow Clean air filter monthly to maintain efficiency Ideal for rooms up to 215 square feet Create a comfortable, moisture-free environment with this smart dehumidifier that combines advanced protection features with whisper-quiet operation - perfect for modern living spaces where peace and efficiency matter.⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
3547087553.detail_html:
【Smart Auto-Shutoff Dehumidifier with Full Tank Protection】

This compact household dehumidifier automatically stops operation when the 1L water tank reaches capacity, preventing overflows while the clear red indicator light alerts you to empty the container. Designed for worry-free operation, it maintains optimal humidity levels below 45% while consuming minimal energy.

【Energy-Efficient Moisture Control】

Operating at just 42W per hour, this eco-friendly dehumidifier effectively removes excess moisture from your living spaces while keeping electricity costs low. The advanced semiconductor technology continuously circulates air, trapping humidity and releasing refreshed, drier air to protect your belongings from dampness.

【Ultra-Quiet Performance with Sleep Mode】

With noise levels maintained below 46.2 dB, this unit operates quieter than a standard desk fan. The dedicated sleep mode ensures completely silent operation throughout the night, making it ideal for bedrooms and other quiet spaces where peace is prioritized.

【Multi-Room Application】

Perfect for creating healthier environments in moisture-sensitive areas including kitchens, closets, bathrooms, bedrooms, and offices. The compact design effectively controls humidity in spaces up to 215 square feet, preventing mold growth and protecting your valuables from moisture damage.

Technical Specifications:

Product Type: Household Dehumidifier

Rated Voltage: 110-220V (Universal Compatibility)

Water Tank Capacity: 1 Liter

Rated Power: 42W

Noise Level: <46.2 dB

Product Dimensions: 180×125×235mm

Coverage Area: Up to 215 sq ft (20 m²)

Package Includes:

1 × Household Dehumidifier Unit

1 × User Manual

Ideal For:

Small apartments and dorm rooms

Closets and storage areas

Bathrooms and kitchen spaces

Offices and study rooms

Basements and laundry areas

Key Features:

Automatic shutoff with visual indicator

Energy-efficient 42W operation

Ultra-quiet performance below 46.2 dB

Special sleep mode for nighttime use

Compact and portable design

Maintains humidity below 45%

Usage Tips:

Place on a flat, stable surface for optimal performance

Empty water tank promptly when indicator light activates

Keep unit away from walls and furniture for proper airflow

Clean air filter monthly to maintain efficiency

Ideal for rooms up to 215 square feet

Create a comfortable, moisture-free environment with this smart dehumidifier that combines advanced protection features with whisper-quiet operation - perfect for modern living spaces where peace and efficiency matter.⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

2137383239.detail_text: *** Welcome to the Simplus Official Store. Our focus is on vacuum cleaners, air fryers, dehumidifiers and other small electrical appliances. Thank you, and enjoy your Simplus buying experience! ⭐ Product Features One-click to dehumidify , simple operation. Small body but can dehumidify 380ml /day No chemical pollution, no harmful gases-leaking. Quiet and low noise. Low-carbon and environmentally friendly Rated power 23W Automatically power off when water's full. 600ml separate water tank, easy to pour water, easy to clean, prevent bacterial contamination. ⭐ Product Specifications Product name: Household Dehumidifier Dehumidification capacity: 380ml/D Water tank capacity: 600ml Shell material: ABS Power: 23W Size: 146mm X 146mm X 227mm Safety mark: 211254-12 ***Note: The dehumidification capacity is the measured result under environmental conditions of 30°C temperature and 80% humidity. *** Simplus After-Sales Policy - Customers have the option to return/refund the product if they are dissatisfied with it or if it has quality issues after 30 days of receiving it, along with images and reasoning. - Returns are not accepted for used, damaged, or non-resalable items. - If you encounter a warehouse error or send incomplete product parts, please notify the customer care via live chat, and we will resolve the issue for the customer as quickly as possible. - If the buyer keeps the device for more than 30 days, Simplus provides a one-year warranty (exchange only, no repair). *** Welcome to the Simplus Official Store.

Our focus is on vacuum cleaners, air fryers, dehumidifiers and other small electrical appliances.

Thank you, and enjoy your Simplus buying experience!

⭐ Product Features

One-click to dehumidify , simple operation.

Small body but can dehumidify 380ml /day

No chemical pollution, no harmful gases-leaking.

Quiet and low noise.

Low-carbon and environmentally friendly Rated power 23W

Automatically power off when water's full.

600ml separate water tank, easy to pour water, easy to clean, prevent bacterial contamination.

⭐ Product Specifications

Product name: Household Dehumidifier

Dehumidification capacity: 380ml/D

Water tank capacity: 600ml

Shell material: ABS

Power: 23W

Size: 146mm X 146mm X 227mm

Safety mark: 211254-12

***Note:

The dehumidification capacity is the measured result under environmental conditions of 30°C temperature and 80% humidity.

*** Simplus After-Sales Policy

- Customers have the option to return/refund the product if they are dissatisfied with it or if it has quality issues after 30 days of receiving it, along with images and reasoning.

- Returns are not accepted for used, damaged, or non-resalable items.

- If you encounter a warehouse error or send incomplete product parts, please notify the customer care via live chat, and we will resolve the issue for the customer as quickly as possible.

- If the buyer keeps the device for more than 30 days, Simplus provides a one-year warranty (exchange only, no repair). The customer must be a simplus member and can reach out to customer care via live chat for more details on the Simplus one-year guarantee and scope of use.

*** Note

- When unboxing the package, customers should photograph the goods to expedite after-sales handling if there is an issue with it.

- The one-year guarantee may only be used once per order.

- If an order is returned for reasons other than product quality, the client is liable for the return shipping expenses.

brand.suggestion: More Heating, Cooling and Ventilation from Simplus

product.desc:
*** Welcome to the Simplus Official Store.

Our focus is on vacuum cleaners, air fryers, dehumidifiers and other small electrical appliances.

Thank you, and enjoy your Simplus buying experience!

⭐ Product Features

One-click to dehumidify , simple operation.

Small body but can dehumidify 380ml /day

No chemical pollution, no harmful gases-leaking.

Quiet and low noise.

Low-carbon and environmentally friendly Rated power 23W

Automatically power off when water's full.

600ml separate water tank, easy to pour water, easy to clean, prevent bacterial contamination.

⭐ Product Specifications

Product name: Household Dehumidifier

Dehumidification capacity: 380ml/D

Water tank capacity: 600ml

Shell material: ABS

Power: 23W

Size: 146mm X 146mm X 227mm

Safety mark: 211254-12

***Note:

The dehumidification capacity is the measured result under environmental conditions of 30°C temperature and 80% humidity.

*** Simplus After-Sales Policy

- Customers have the option to return/refund the product if they are dissatisfied with it or if it has quality issues after 30 days of receiving it, along with images and reasoning.

- Returns are not accepted for used, damaged, or non-resalable items.

- If you encounter a warehouse error or send incomplete product parts, please notify the customer care via live chat, and we will resolve the issue for the customer as quickly as possible.

- If the buyer keeps the device for more than 30 days, Simplus provides a one-year warranty (exchange only, no repair). The customer must be a simplus member and can reach out to customer care via live chat for more details on the Simplus one-year guarantee and scope of use.

*** Note

- When unboxing the package, customers should photograph the goods to expedite after-sales handling if there is an issue with it.

- The one-year guarantee may only be used once per order.

- If an order is returned for reasons other than product quality, the client is liable for the return shipping expenses.

product.highlights:
• [High-quality silica gel]: This silica gel desiccant is made of high-quality silica gel and non-woven fabric. The material can effectively absorb moisture and is durable, keeping your items dry and well protected.
  • [Moisture absorption function]: This desiccant is designed to absorb moisture and prevent moisture, which is perfect for keeping storage spaces dry. They help prevent mold and rust, ensuring that your items remain in good condition.
  • [Convenient size]: The small package size of this desiccant is6*7 cm, with a compact structure and easy to place in various storage spaces.
  • [Long shelf life]: This desiccant has an unopened shelf life of 2 years and is a reliable and long-lasting moisture-proof solution. The non-woven packaging ensures that the desiccant remains effective until use.
  • [Quantity selection]: Each package contains 10 packets of silica gel desiccant, which can provide sufficient desiccant for multiple storage areas.
